CLogin::OnSetAccountResult#AfterLogin.notes: gms_v72 AFTER_LOGIN (COutPacket op 9) built by CLogin::OnSetAccountResult @0x5b553a send block @0x5b5598. Legacy wire carries Encode4(accountId @g_pWvsContext+8232) between opt2 and the pin string; v83 omits it. Atlas gates the int to GMS<83.

calls.comment: accountId @0x5b55c3 (*(g_pWvsContext+8232)) — LEGACY-ONLY int, absent in v83+

CScriptMan::OnAskMembershopAvatar#AskMem.notes: v72 CScriptMan::OnAskMembershopAvatar@0x6a18d4 (msgType 9 = ASK_MEMBER_SHOP_AVATAR): DecodeStr(message) + Decode1(count) + count x [DecodeBuffer(8) SN + Decode1] (candidates read then looked up via CharacterData::GetItem). Per-entry int64 SN + byte is incompatible with the v83+ int32 style-id list; Atlas has no server-side SN data, so count=0 for the legacy range. Atlas AskMemberShopAvatarConversationDetail (GMS<83 gate): AsciiString(Message)+WriteByte(0) -> matches DecodeStr+Decode1(0).

calls.comment: count (cash-avatar SN entries; 0 for the legacy range, Atlas drives no candidates)

CScriptMan::OnAskMenu#Selection.notes: v72 ask-menu selection reply: after the msgType+action frame the client appends Encode1(selection index) (OnAskMenu@0x6a15a6 Encode1(v18)). Narrow (single byte) for v72. Matches Atlas ContinueConversationSelection narrow (Byte selection).

CScriptMan::OnAskText#Reply.notes: v72 ask-text reply: after the msgType+action frame the client appends EncodeStr(text) (OnAskText@0x6a1161 EncodeStr on result==1). Matches Atlas ContinueConversationText (AsciiString text).

CScriptMan::OnSay#Reply.notes: v72 NPC conversation reply frame: the per-msgType handler builds COutPacket(59) Encode1 msgType + Encode1 action (OnSay@0x6a0d23 Encode1(0)+Encode1(action)). Matches Atlas ContinueConversation (Byte lastMessageType + Byte action).

CShopDlg::OnPacket#GenericError.notes: v72 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x6a912b (op 272) sole data-bearing arm = mode 14: Decode1(hasReason); hasReason==0 -> plain notice (no string). Atlas ShopOperationGenericError writes Byte(mode)+Bool(false). Mode 14 per npc_shop_operation.yaml (gms_v72). No Decode4 anywhere -> OVER/UNDER_LEVEL version-absent.

calls.comment: hasReason flag (0 for plain GENERIC_ERROR; no reason string follows)

CShopDlg::OnPacket#GenericErrorWithReaso.notes: v72 CShopDlg::OnPacket@0x6a912b (op 272) mode 14: Decode1(hasReason)!=0 -> DecodeStr(reason) shown as Notice. Atlas ShopOperationGenericErrorWithReason writes Byte(mode)+Bool(true)+AsciiString(reason). Mode 14 per npc_shop_operation.yaml (gms_v72).

calls.comment: reason (DecodeStr; shown as the Notice text)
